name: Aurora Modern
signature: Three slow-drifting aurora gradient blobs blend behind real frosted-glass cards (genuine backdrop-filter blur, not a translucent color), a flowing gradient line replaces plain dividers, couple names shift through a violet-pink-teal gradient continuously, the cover glow intensifies on open, a techy dot-grid textures the background, and a maximized ten-layer field of glowing orbs, rings, and sparks (140 total decorative elements — the highest density of all 15 themes) floats and parallaxes across every section.
brief: For couples wanting something unmistakably contemporary and tech-forward rather than traditional — soft gradient motion, frosted-glass cards, confident modern type, pushed to maximum liveliness as the flagship closing theme. Includes full standard section set (Susunan Acara, Dress Code, Hashtag, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
